description: §21.3 — a bare npm-style import specifier (`import { map } from 'lodash'`) fires E-IMPORT-005. scrml import specifiers must be relative (`./`), stdlib (`scrml:`), or vendor (`vendor:`).
rationale: §21.3 (§40.4): a bare `lodash` specifier is not project-scoped. To import from an npm package it must be vendored and referenced as `vendor:lodash`; a bare name is rejected E-IMPORT-005.
